generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the motor for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPosition
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind gearbox for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPosition
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorCurrent
]

instance MotorEncoderPosition : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPosition : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorCurrent : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position angle from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPosition
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredSecondaryPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position angle from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPosition
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrent
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque from robot dynamics models and manufacturer parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrent
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPosition
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedAcceleration : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration from angular velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPosition
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated current data from robot dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrent
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data from robot dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrent
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity data from robot dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPosition
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for permanent magnet synchronous motor behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for gearwheel behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for cycloidal gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for SysML structural modeling of robot first axis"
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelingService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance DataLinkingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for data linking using Asset Administration Shells"
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data linking and interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLinkingService
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for data streaming via MQTT protocol"
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance RobotControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for robot motion control using Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables RobotControlService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for unified data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterIdentification
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of data traces in unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance InsightProvisionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provision of insights for improving robot motion control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceInsight, CalibrationInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterIdentification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of friction parameters for motion accuracy improvement"
]

instance MaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights for maintenance planning"
]

instance CalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights for calibration procedures"
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for visualizing data traces in dashboard"
]

instance RobotControlAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MABIMAX100RobotFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with [-90°, 90°] working range and 0.1 mm positional accuracy"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor converting current to torque"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel transforming rotational energy"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox providing final torque output"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, encoders, CNC controller), MQTT data streams, processing components (Simulink models), data traces, and visualization dashboard for unified monitoring and analysis of joint friction."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, continuously monitoring and analyzing friction during robot operation to account for wear, tool changes, and application variations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured data to detect deviations in friction loss, with continuous refinement of white-box and black-box friction models based on operational data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data (current, position) from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for data semantics and interoperability, SysML for system modeling standards."
]
